description: A designer has finished creating a new set of ads and needs to submit them to the client for approval.

nodes.task_description: Export the final ad creatives in the required format (e.g., JPG, PNG).

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates the final ad files.

nodes.task_description: Upload the creatives to a project management or proofing tool.

expected_outcome.value: Agent uploads the files for client review.

nodes.task_description: Notify the client that the ads are ready for their review and feedback.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends a notification to the client.
